privileged_info_summary: The input data is the official HEC-RAS 'Muncie' example project (version 6.6). The upstream-most cross-section is River Station '15696.24', which contains 134 geometry points. The minimum bed elevation (thalweg) is approximately 936.99 ft, and the maximum bank elevation is 963.04 ft. The cross_section_info.txt output must contain these identifiers, and the stage_area_curve.csv should contain hydraulic properties evaluated across 25 elevation steps within this range (936.99 to 963.04).
